1868330.name: Magnet Game
1868330.description:
Step into the world of Magnet Game, a retro-inspired 2D puzzle adventure where opposites don’t just attract – they’re the key to success.

Guide two marvellous magnets through twisting mazes packed with obstacles, doors, and devious switches. The deeper you go, the more mind-bending the puzzles become – as left becomes right and every second counts. Connect the magnets as fast as you can to beat the clock!

Features

  • Magnetic Mechanics – Use red and blue charges to activate switches and unlock doors.

  • Challenging Puzzles – Outsmart pressure plates, buttons, and timer switches across tricky levels.

  • Fast-Paced Thinking – Test both your timing and your logic under pressure.

  • Retro Pixel Aesthetic – Industrial sci-fi visuals with crisp pixel art and arcade charm.

Can you bring the magnets together before time runs out?
